description: Export current building blocks to a file. If a file name s is not supplied, the name of the current set will be used. The extension of the file will be “.f3bset”. The optional switch binary specifies binary output. The default is text format.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Export current building blocks to a file. If a file name s is not supplied, the name of the current set will be used. The extension of the file will be “.f3bset”. The optional switch binary specifies binary output. The default is text format.
